judgment.summary: Growing revenue and strong free cash flow are offset by negative margins and a leveraged balance sheet.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 31.0%; next earnings date is 2026-04-30.
positives: Revenue growth 31.7% YoY — strong top-line expansion.
Free cash flow (TTM) $1.44B — healthy cash generation.
Forward P/E 13.90x — reasonable valuation given growth.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a mean target of $143.18.
negatives: Operating margin -2.0% and Profit margin -3.5% — currently unprofitable on an operating basis.
Return on equity -19.3% and Return on assets -1.9% — negative returns on capital.
Debt/Equity 141.41 and Current ratio 0.70 — high leverage and tight liquidity.
Total debt $1.24B vs $1.14B cash — net debt position.

news.paragraph: A recent headline mentions a tech boss dismissing an HR team for fabricating issues, a piece of news that is not directly related to Atlassian Corporation's (TEAM) business operations or financial performance. Traders should focus on the company's fundamentals and upcoming earnings for relevant catalysts, as this news item appears to be anecdotal and lacks specific connection to the underlying.

headlines.title: Tech boss sacks HR team for ‘creating problems that didn’t exist’
